root_text.an4.136:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sīlesu na paripūrakārī hoti, samādhismiṁ na paripūrakārī, paññāya na paripūrakārī.
root_text.an4.136:2.1: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sīlesu paripūrakārī hoti, samādhismiṁ na paripūrakārī, paññāya na paripūrakārī.
root_text.an4.136:3.1: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sīlesu paripūrakārī hoti, samādhismiṁ paripūrakārī, paññāya na paripūrakārī.
root_text.an4.136:4.1: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sīlesu paripūrakārī hoti, samādhismiṁ paripūrakārī, paññāya paripūrakārī.
root_text.an4.136:4.2: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.136:1.1: “Mendicants, these four individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.136:1.3: One individual has not fulfilled ethics, immersion, or wisdom.
translation_text.an4.136:2.1: One individual has fulfilled ethics, but not immersion or wisdom.
translation_text.an4.136:3.1: One individual has fulfilled ethics and immersion, but not wisdom.
translation_text.an4.136:4.1: One individual has fulfilled ethics, immersion, and wisdom.
translation_text.an4.136:4.2: These are the four individuals found in the world.”
